# GTM Solutions Consulting
> Specialist GTM coaching for B2B SaaS revenue leaders focused on value discovery, decision confidence, and commercial clarity.

## About
Nikhil Sarma is a GTM coach and consultant based in the UAE, formerly based in Germany. He has coached 800+ GTM professionals across 41 B2B SaaS companies in 14 countries, contributing to $72M+ in attributed revenue across EMEA and APAC. His background includes individual contributor and first-line management roles at Dolby, Optimizely, Lofelt, and Contentful.

He works with a limited number of clients at any time to ensure depth over volume.

## Who he works with
- CROs and VPs of GTM seeking cross-functional alignment across the revenue motion
- VPs of Sales carrying number responsibility in enterprise B2B SaaS
- Heads and VPs of Solutions Engineering whose teams are commercially underutilised
- Revenue leaders whose teams are losing deals to no-decision rather than competition

## Core problems addressed
- Improving win rates in enterprise B2B SaaS
- Reducing no-decision outcomes in complex sales cycles
- Sales coaching and discovery coaching for AEs and SEs
- Value discovery training for revenue teams
- Demo coaching and storytelling training for presales and solutions engineering
- Building shared operating models across AEs, SEs, CS, and Professional Services
- Forecast quality improvement through deal quality rather than CRM hygiene
- Commercial negotiation coaching grounded in established value

## The Decision Confidence Operating System
A structured coaching framework built around a single buyer outcome: decision confidence. Covers five modules delivered as a 6-8 week engagement applied to live pipeline, cross-functional by design.

Modules:
- Value Discovery (foundational anchor): structured discovery grounded in the buyer's business context, competitive pressures, and decision-making structure
- Storytelling for Decision Confidence: building commercial narratives that travel through buying committees without the seller in the room
- Value Demonstration: demo structures built around decisions and stakeholders, not features
- Business Acumen and Financial Fluency: speaking the language of economic buyers, ROI frameworks, business case development
- Negotiation: value-led approaches to procurement that protect margin

## Proprietary frameworks
- **Value Discovery Map**: connects discovery across the three key levels of stakeholders in any organisation — C-level (strategic priorities and risk), Managerial (operational impact and metrics), and Operational (day-to-day pain and workflow). Ensures multi-threaded discovery rather than single-threaded qualification.
- **Compass Questioning Model**: a structured questioning methodology for value discovery conversations
- **Storytelling for Decision Confidence**: a framework for building buyer-facing narratives anchored in outcomes, not features
- **Understanding the B in B2B**: a framework for building business acumen and financial fluency in sales and presales teams
- **Value Demonstration**: a methodology for structuring demos around the stakeholders who need to say yes

## Engagement model
- Duration: 6-8 weeks per engagement
- Format: weekly sessions, 70% application on live deals
- Functions: AEs, SEs, CS, and Professional Services coached together
- Leadership integration: CRO and VP-level briefings throughout

## Geographic reach
EMEA, APAC. Has worked with teams at Adobe, Cloudflare, Splunk, Deloitte, Storyblok, Contentful, Locus, ClickUp, Twilio, Altana, ScalePad, Thinkproject, Precursive, and others.

## Pages
- /: Overview of GTM coaching philosophy and services
- /coaching: Full coaching engagement detail, methodology, case study (Precursive/Jonathan Corrie), outcomes by function
- /about: Background, principles, and point of view on buying, selling, and value
- /blog: GTM insights, frameworks, and perspectives on decision confidence
